name: Interaction between the phosphodiesterase 5 inhibitor, tadalafil and 2 alpha-blockers, doxazosin and tamsulosin in healthy normotensive men.
summary: Two double-blind placebo-controlled randomized crossover clinical pharmacology studies in healthy normotensive men evaluating tadalafil with doxazosin 8 mg and tamsulosin 0.4 mg.

access_attempts.result: PubMed abstract and metadata accessed through web search.
